Services

Outdoor work for cleanup, curb appeal, and usable land.

This version stays clean and honest. It only uses the service information visible in your photos.

Stump Grinding

Remove old stumps and open the space back up for a cleaner, safer yard.

Mowing

Keep grass and overgrowth under control for homes, lots, and general property cleanup.

Fencing

Support for fencing jobs that improve boundaries, privacy, and overall property function.

Landscaping

General landscaping work that helps the property look sharper and stay easier to maintain.

Built to Convert

Simple, credible, and hard to break.

The main problem with the last version was file dependency. If one image folder or file path breaks, the site breaks. This version fixes that by putting everything into one single HTML file.

  • One file only
  • No asset folder needed
  • No stylesheet file needed
  • Works on GitHub Pages
  • Mobile friendly
